lead.titleZh: 肩钙化性肌腱炎：超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射的 RCT 比较
lead.titleEn: Calcific Tendinitis: RCT Comparison of Ultrasound-Guided Lavage vs. Subacromial Bursa Injection
lead.paragraphZh: 今日共 5 条新讯，涵盖 3 个专科领域。骨科与肌骨、神经康复、运动康复各有 1 项最高分研究（75 分）。骨科条目中一项 RCT 比较了超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎，临床证据等级高，值得重点关注。
lead.paragraphEn: Today's 5 new entries span 3 specialties, with Ortho & Musculoskeletal, Neuro Rehab, and Sports Rehab each presenting a top-scoring study (75 points). The Ortho entry, an RCT comparing ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection for calcific tendinitis, offers high-level evidence and warrants close attention.

items.title: COMPARISON OF ULTRASOUND-GUIDED LAVAGE AND SUBACROMIAL BURSA INJECTION FOR CALCIFIC TENDINITIS: A PROSPECTIVE, RANDOMIZED, DOUBLE-BLIND TRIAL
items.summary: This prospective, randomized, double-blind trial aimed to compare ultrasound-guided subacromial bursa injection and ultrasound-guided lavage for calcific tendinitis based on clinical and ultrasonographic findings.
items.curatedReason: 超声引导下抽吸灌洗（lavage）和肩峰下滑囊注射（SBI）在钙化性肌腱炎的治疗中均显示出积极效果。这项试验提供了两者在临床和超声表现上比较的证据，你可根据患者具体情况和自身技术选择更合适的方案。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的比较：一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验
items.curatedReasonEn: Both ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection (SBI) show positive effects in treating calcific tendinitis. This trial provides comparative evidence on their clinical and ultrasonographic outcomes, allowing you to choose the more suitable option based on patient specifics and your expertise.
items.limitation: 研究未提及具体样本量和随访时间，可能影响结果的可靠性和长期有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not mention the specific sample size or follow-up period, which may affect the reliability and long-term effectiveness of the results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Immersive virtual reality for upper limb rehabilitation in people with MS: a randomised, controlled feasibility study.
items.summary: An eight-week immersive virtual reality (VR) intervention using co-produced games for upper limb rehabilitation in 19 people with MS showed good feasibility and adherence (87%).
items.curatedReason: 沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）游戏用于多发性硬化症（MS）患者上肢康复的可行性研究，招募和依从性均良好。未来大规模 RCT 有望明确其疗效，可在临床考虑作为辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式虚拟现实上肢康复在多发性硬化症患者中的随机对照可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期八周的沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）上肢康复干预在 19 名多发性硬化症患者中显示出良好的可行性（依从性达 87%）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study on immersive VR games for upper limb rehabilitation in MS patients showed good recruitment and adherence. Future large-scale RCTs could confirm efficacy; consider it as an adjunctive tool in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 小样本的可行性研究，非旨在评估疗效，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Small-sample feasibility study, not designed for efficacy, with limited generalizability.

items.title: Apraxia in Patients with Cognitive Impairment: Evidence from Familiar Tool Use
items.summary: This commentary explores apraxia in patients with cognitive impairment, focusing on evidence from familiar tool use as a key indicator of daily living ability decline.
items.curatedReason: 认知障碍患者的失用症，尤其是在熟悉工具使用方面的表现，是临床评估的重要关注点。这提示你在评估认知障碍患者的日常活动能力时，应细致观察和评估其工具使用的精确性和流畅性，以便进行针对性的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 认知障碍患者的失用症：来自熟悉工具使用的证据
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论探讨了认知障碍患者的失用症，重点关注其在熟悉工具使用方面的表现，以此作为日常活动能力下降的关键指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: Apraxia in patients with cognitive impairment, particularly in familiar tool use, is a key clinical concern. When assessing daily living activities in cognitively impaired patients, you should meticulously observe and evaluate the precision and fluidity of their tool use to guide targeted rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为评论性质，需参考其引用的原始研究设计细节。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary; refer to the original study designs for full details.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke and in older adults
items.summary: This study found that better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke patients (n=23) and age-matched older adults (n=21).
items.curatedReason: 慢性卒中患者和老年人在运动适应性学习中存在遗忘现象，且与即时陈述性记忆相关。你在设计运动康复方案时，应考虑如何优化学习策略，以减少遗忘，可能需要更多重复或不同形式的反馈来巩固运动记忆。
items.titleZh: 更好的即时陈述性记忆与慢性卒中和老年人步态适应性遗忘相关
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现，在慢性卒中患者 (n=23) 和同龄老年人 (n=21) 的运动适应过程中，更好的即时陈述性记忆与遗忘现象相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Chronic stroke patients and older adults experience forgetting in sensorimotor adaptation, which is associated with immediate declarative memory. When designing motor rehabilitation programs, you should consider optimizing learning strategies to reduce forgetting, potentially requiring more repetition or varied feedback to consolidate motor memory.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性设计，样本量相对较小（卒中组 n=23，对照组 n=21），且为单中心研究，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study with a relatively small sample size (n=23 for stroke, n=21 for controls) and is a single-center study, potentially affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort identified mindset, effort, and support as foundational factors determining their decision to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 定性分析揭示了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决定因素，涵盖心态、努力和支持。在康复过程中，除了生理恢复，还要关注患者的心理动机、治疗依从性以及医护人员和家属的支持，这有助于更全面地支持患者重返运动。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持：ACL 损伤患者重返运动决定的基础——NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 对 NACOX 队列中 112 名患者进行的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是决定 ACL 损伤后患者重返运动的核心因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Qualitative analysis highlights mindset, effort, and support as key determinants for ACL injury patients returning to sport. In rehabilitation, beyond physical recovery, focus on patients' psychological motivation, treatment adherence, and support from clinicians and family to comprehensively support their return to sport.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量虽可观但结论主要为概念性理解，非量化证据。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study; while the sample size is decent, conclusions are conceptual, not quantitative.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine
